title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 198.151 - Usual trade discounts and employment benefits not kickbacks, bribes or rebates
text:
198.151.  Usual trade discounts and employment benefits not kickbacks, bribes or rebates. — Sections 198.145 and 198.148 do not apply to:
  (1)  Any usual trade discount which is dependent solely upon time of payment or quantity buying to wholesalers which is obtained by a health care provider regardless of whether reflected in the cost claimed or charges made by the health care provider under Medicaid; and
  (2)  Any amount paid by an employer to an employee, who has a bona fide employment relationship with the employer, for employment in the provision of covered services or items.
(L. 1979 S.B. 328, et al. § 49) 
Effective 7-1-79
